betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Cooling Tower§f provides large-scale heat dissipation.

§eTask:§f Craft 1x §bLarge Cooling Tower§f (machine_tower_large)

§eFunction:§f
• Massive heat dissipation capacity
• Essential for reactor cooling at scale
• Evaporates heat to atmosphere

§eSetup:§f
• Connect to cooling water loops
• Requires continuous water supply
• Returns cooled water to system

§eUse Cases:§f
• Large reactor installations
• Industrial process cooling
• High-capacity heat management

§aTip:§f The large tower handles significantly more heat than auxiliary towers.
